product.name: Car Floor Mats Custom Fit for Jeep Grand Cherokee L 7 Seat 2021-2025 2026 Rubber Auto Floor Liners Set All Weather Protection, Black(NOT Fit for 6-Passenger)
product.description: 1、Heavy Duty Rubber MaterialThis heavy rubber liners protect the interior of your vehicle. The product can be used in every season, heavy rubber material and deep surface lines can protect trunk and allows you to carry a wide variety of items without damaging, tearing, ripping, shredding, or staining the interior. 2、Can Be Used In All Climates, Resistant To High Temperature And Low Temperature, Not Easy To DeformThe special material of heavy rubber structure makes this car floor carpet easy to clean and easy to use. Because the structural molecules are stable and less affected by the external environment, the original shape can be kept unchanged for a long time.Our product carries on the thorough upgrade to the traditional material and the performance, the surface deepens the grain, it’s perfect for defending your automobile's trunk from the elements as well as dirt, mud, liquid, hair, leaves, and normal wear and tear.
features: Appropriate Size & Adjustable: Size perfectly matches your beloved car; if you still need to change the size，can be trimmed with scissors to suit your vehicle which design with decorative line.
Easy To Clean & Durability Car Carpet: Clean the dirt and mud on the pad only by using a common hose; without maintenance, the durability of the product itself can be maintained for a long time.

All-weather Protection Car Floor Liners: The product is made from odorless rubber and is designed to prevent the deformation of high temperature or low temperature. The surface is like a tire pattern design, which can enhance the anti slip function.

High Quality Material & Tasteless: The product uses high quality rubber material, has the corrosion resistance and not easy to deform the characteristic, will not bring the peculiar smell in the vehicle, maintains the vehicle environment air fresh.
Strong Grip & Safety Upgrade: Product adhesion is strong, can be effectively fixed on the floor, the use of the process is not easy to shift, safe and more secure.
